settings.heading: Pastor-Written
settings.copy: Real biblical insight. No AI. Practical encouragement for daily faith, written by a real pastor.

settings.heading: No App Needed
settings.copy: Just tap your phone. Scripture, prayer, devotion, audio, and a one-year Bible reading plan—all in one tap.

settings.heading: Works Everywhere
settings.copy: iPhone and Android compatible. A QR code backup ships in every package, just in case.

settings.heading: Devotionals & Prayer
settings.copy: Bible studies, prayer journals, and workbooks for deeper engagement with God's Word.

settings.heading: Printables & Resources
settings.copy: Downloadable guides for Bible study, family discipleship, and church leadership.

settings.heading: Faith Apparel
settings.copy: Christian apparel designed to spark conversations about Christ.
